title: Bone Shards
description:
If [gold]Osty[/gold] is alive, he deals 9 damage to ALL enemies and you gain 9 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Osty[/gold] dies.
upgraded_description:
If [gold]Osty[/gold] is alive, he deals 12 damage to ALL enemies and you gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Osty[/gold] dies.
